accurate.why: All claims are supported by the bill text; all conditions described accurately.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose: transferring federal lands to Utah for three state parks.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Bill does not amend existing statutory law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Accurately covers all conditions including easements, water rights, reversionary interest, and cost allocation.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the 180-day deadlines and December 11 enactment; wait—actually December 23, 2024 is the enactment date, which is not cited but also not wrong since the summary says 'no separate effective date provision' rather than a wrong date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all three conveyances and their conditions comprehensively.

concise.why: Very detailed, listing nearly all sub-provisions and conditions at excessive length.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies all relevant agencies, parks, and land designations.

correct_figures.why: 180-day deadline and all specific provisions are accurately represented.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
